leadText: Furfrou (Japanese: トリミアン Trimmien) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Furfrou can have its hair trimmed into nine different styles, changing its appearance from its Natural Form into one of the following trims, each named after the style its fur is trimmed and dyed in: Heart Trim, Star Trim, Diamond Trim, Debutante Trim, Matron Trim, Dandy Trim, La Reine Trim, Kabuki Trim, and Pharaoh Trim. Furfrou will revert back to its Natural Form if five days have passed since it was trimmed. Other circumstances may also cause it to revert. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Form data for these details.)

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Furfrou is a quadrupedal, canine Pokémon with thick, white fur that covers its black body apart from its paws and face. The fur is thicker and fluffier around its head and tail. It has round, red eyes with blue eyelids, a pointed snout with a round, light blue nose, and long rectangular ears. When its mouth is open, two pointed teeth can be seen on its upper jaw. Furfrou used to guard the king in the ancient times of Kalos and is known to be loyal to its Trainer . [ 1 ] Furfrou is said to be very intelligent. By the time of Pokémon Legends: Z-A , a "Furfrou League" has been established in Lumiose City , complete with its own Elite Four and Champion, where all participants only use Furfrou to battle one another. Prior to Generation VII , Furfrou was the only known Pokémon that could have Fur Coat as an Ability . Forms [ edit | edit source ] Furfrou has ten different forms named after the style its fur is trimmed and dyed in: Natural Form, Heart Trim, Star Trim, Diamond Trim, Debutante Trim, Matron Trim, Dandy Trim, La Reine Trim, Kabuki Trim, and Pharaoh Trim. It is commonly seen with its fur trimmed and dyed into various styles. However, only those it trusts are allowed to cut its fur. In the past, aristocrats would even compete over who could trim its fur into the most exquisite style. Cutting its fur increases the swiftness of its movements. Natural Form Heart Trim Star Trim Diamond Trim Debutante Trim Matron Trim Dandy Trim La Reine Trim Kabuki Trim Pharaoh Trim ↑ Furfrou (archived)

Pokémon GO Base HP: 181 Base Attack: 164 Base Defense: 167 Egg Distance: N/A Buddy Distance: 5 km Evolution Requirement: 25 + 10,000 Fast Attacks: Take Down , Bite , Sucker Punch , Sand Attack * Charged Attacks: Surf , Dark Pulse , Grass Knot Furfrou's forms may vary in availability depending on the player's location and in-game events . Form Availability Natural Form In the wild globally Heart Trim As a form change globally, only during the Valentine's Day event Star Trim As a form change in Asia-Pacific Diamond Trim As a form change in Europe, the Middle East, and Africa Debutante Trim As a form change in the Americas Matron Trim As a form change globally Dandy Trim As a form change globally La Reine Trim As a form change in France Kabuki Trim As a form change in Japan Pharaoh Trim As a form change in Egypt Form data [ edit | edit source ] Furfrou has ten different forms. It is in its Natural Form by default and can be groomed into one of nine different trims: Heart Trim, Star Trim, Diamond Trim, Debutante Trim, Matron Trim, Dandy Trim, La Reine Trim, Kabuki Trim, and Pharaoh Trim. It will remain with one of these trims for five days after being groomed, after which it will revert back to its Natural Form. Furfrou will also lose its trim when it is deposited in a Box (in Generation VI ), withdrawn from a Box (in Generation VII ), deposited in Pokémon Bank , or deposited in the Pokémon Day Care or Pokémon Nursery . However, it is possible to deposit trimmed Furfrou in Pokémon HOME by transfering it from Pokémon GO via the GO Transporter . The location at which Furfrou can be groomed differs between games: In Pokémon X and Y , Furfrou can be groomed at Friseur Furfrou on Vernal Avenue in Lumiose City for $ 500. The player gains access to more trims as they become more stylish : the Heart, Star, and Diamond Trims are available initially, the La Reine, Kabuki, and Pharaoh Trims are made available at 10 style points, and the Debutante, Matron, and Dandy Trims are made available at 50 style points. In Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire , Furfrou can be groomed at the Pokémon Fan Club in Slateport City for $ 500. In Pokémon Sun, Moon , Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon , Furfrou can be groomed for $ 500 by a Punk Girl at Malie City 's salon or, in Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, a Beauty at Hau'oli City 's salon. In Pokémon Legends: Z-A , Furfrou can be groomed by Mirte in Jaune Sector 6 for $ 500 after the player completes the "Becoming a Furfrou Trimmer" side mission . More trims become available as the player completes more side missions for Mirte: the Heart, Star, and Diamond Trims are available initially, the Debutante, Matron, and Dandy Trims are made available after completing "Becoming a Pro Furfrou Trimmer", and the La Reine, Kabuki, and Pharaoh Trims are made available after completing "Becoming a Peerless Furfrou Trimmer". These locations also allow the player to revert a trimmed Furfrou to its Natural Form. In Pokémon X and Y only, Furfrou's trims are not registered as distinct forms in the Pokédex . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry XY008 Furfrou Ash's Pokédex Furfrou, the Poodle Pokémon. Furfrou were assigned the task of protecting kings who ruled the Kalos region in ancient times.
